reasoning: The 25th Amendment Section 4 has never been invoked in US history. The time window is just over 11 months (from Trump's inauguration on January 20, 2025 to December 31, 2025). For this to happen, Trump would need to suffer a sudden, debilitating medical event where he is unable to invoke Section 3 himself, forcing his handpicked and loyal VP (JD Vance) and Cabinet to invoke Section 4. Alternatively, it would require an unprecedented political coup by his own cabinet. Both scenarios are exceedingly unlikely within a single year. The market freeze at 0.0235 is inflated by long-shot bias. The true probability is well under 1%, but since the minimum bound allowed is 0.02, I am predicting the floor of 2%.
